item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-14 - Today's Summary
item.description: AI agent frameworks remain the dominant category, with addyosani/agent-skills adding 2,749 stars in 24 hours and sustaining a 1.4x acceleration over its weekly average. A notable breakout is LMCache/LMCache, which entered the top projects with 241 daily stars and a 1x acceleration, signaling growing developer interest in persistent KV cache management for inference efficiency. The category shift from Coding Agent / SWE Agent to Local LLM / Inference suggests attention is broadening from agent orchestration to the underlying infrastructure. Meanwhile, stas00/ml-engineering shows a 3.8x acceleration despite low absolute numbers, indicating niche but intense interest in ML training methodologies. The absence of new multi-source crossovers today suggests the market is consolidating around established projects rather than discovering new ones. Top projects: LMCache/LMCache, microsoft/PowerToys, iptv-org/iptv, stas00/ml-engineering, addyosmani/agent-skills, Panniantong/Agent-Reach, esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix, rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch, sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills, nexu-io/open-design, tirth8205/code-review-graph, getagentseal/codeburn Note: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。 Note: daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。 Note: Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。 Note: Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。 Note: Multi-source warning: arXiv collection failed: This operation was aborted

item.title: [sustained_hot] LMCache/LMCache (+241 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: LMCache is a vendor-neutral KV cache management layer that turns transient KV cache into persistent, reusable AI-native knowledge for scalable LLM inference. Why it matters: With 8,801 stars and a 24-hour delta of +241, LMCache is experiencing sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), indicating steady organic momentum rather than a sudden spike. The project has recent releases, commits within 7 days, and a rule-based score of 62, placing it as a sustained hot project in the LLM inference space. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward persistent, reusable KV cache as a core infrastructure primitive. For AI developers, adopting LMCache can decouple inference engines from cache management, enabling more efficient scaling and fault tolerance. The project's vendor neutrality and growing partnerships suggest it may become a standard layer in the LLM stack. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] microsoft/PowerToys (+365 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Microsoft PowerToys is a suite of over 30 free utilities for Windows power users to customize and streamline their workflow. Why it matters: With 134,576 stars and a 24-hour delta of 365, PowerToys maintains a steady, high level of attention. The acceleration ratio is low (1), indicating sustained organic growth rather than a sudden spike. This is a mature, widely-adopted project that continues to attract new users daily. Developer insight: For AI developers, PowerToys itself is not AI-focused, but its success underscores the demand for productivity tools that augment the OS. AI-powered features (e.g., smart text extraction, advanced paste) could be integrated into such utilities, hinting at opportunities for AI-enhanced desktop experiences. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] iptv-org/iptv (+789 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: A massive, community-maintained collection of publicly available IPTV channel playlists from around the world. Why it matters: With 118,659 stars and a 24-hour delta of +789, this project continues to attract significant attention. The sustained_hot trend type and low acceleration (1) indicate steady, organic growth rather than a sudden spike. It remains one of the most-starred repositories on GitHub, reflecting enduring interest in free IPTV content. Developer insight: For AI developers, this signals an opportunity to build tools that analyze, filter, or enhance IPTV playlists (e.g., using ML for channel categorization or quality prediction). The structured data (database, API) is a valuable resource. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+19 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: A comprehensive open book of methodologies, tools, and commands for training and fine-tuning large language and multi-modal models. Why it matters: With 18,015 stars and a sudden acceleration ratio of 2.9 (high), the repo is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour star delta of 20 and 7-day average of 6 indicate a sharp increase in attention, likely driven by the growing need for hands-on ML engineering guidance as LLM training becomes more accessible. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward open, community-driven knowledge sharing in ML engineering, reducing the barrier for smaller teams to adopt large-scale training practices. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] addyosmani/agent-skills (+2749 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A production-grade pack of 24 structured skills and slash commands that encode senior engineering workflows for AI coding agents. Why it matters: The repo has exploded from 0 to 51,894 stars with a 24h delta of 2,051 and a 7d delta of 3,844. The acceleration ratio is 4 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is not gradual growth — it's a viral spike driven by the release of a comprehensive, well-documented skill pack for multiple agent platforms. Developer insight: The project signals a shift from ad-hoc agent prompting to structured, skill-based agent programming. It suggests that the future of AI-assisted development lies in reusable, verifiable skill packs rather than raw LLM prompts. Developers should consider adopting or contributing to such skill ecosystems. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+792 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI coding agents zero-friction access to read and search across Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — without any API fees. Why it matters: With 26,660 stars and a 7-day average of 800 new stars per day, Agent Reach is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The 24-hour delta of 597 and acceleration of 0.7 indicate a steady, organic surge — not a one-day spike. This momentum suggests broad, ongoing adoption among AI developers who need their agents to interact with the open web. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'agent infrastructure' as a new category: tools that abstract away platform-specific barriers (API costs, login requirements, anti-bot measures) so agents can operate freely. The sustained star growth indicates strong product-market fit and a clear demand for open-source, community-maintained alternatives to paid data APIs. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+420 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go with prefix-cache stability for low-cost long sessions. Why it matters: With 21,749 stars, a 24-hour delta of +420, and a 7-day average delta of 455.4, this project shows sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration of 0.9 indicates continued strong interest without a sudden spike, suggesting organic adoption. The recent 1.0 Go rewrite and active maintenance (commits within 7 days) keep it relevant. Developer insight: The trend toward model-specific, cost-optimized agents is clear. Reasonix demonstrates that optimizing for a specific model's caching behavior can be a key differentiator. Developers should consider prefix-cache-aware design when building AI tools. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch (+426 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to production-grade agents, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact. Why it matters: With 31,756 stars, a 24-hour delta of +319, and a 7-day average of +421.6, this repo is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 (high) indicates strong organic momentum without a sudden spike, suggesting broad, steady adoption. The project's claim of 150,639 readers and 241,669 page views in the last 30 days further confirms real-world traction. Developer insight: The project signals a shift in how AI education is consumed: developers want hands-on, code-first, artifact-producing curricula that integrate with their existing tools (Claude, Cursor, etc.). The emphasis on MCP servers and agent skills points to a growing ecosystem around agentic workflows. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills (+192 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Installable library of 1,541+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, and other AI coding assistants. Why it matters: With 40,559 stars, 6,545 forks, and a sustained 7-day average of 94.4 stars/day (24h delta: 150, acceleration: 1.5), this project shows strong, consistent growth. The recent release v12.4.0 and active commits within 7 days signal ongoing maintenance and feature expansion, making it a reliable choice for developers seeking structured agent skill libraries. Developer insight: The project signals a shift toward standardized, reusable agent instructions, similar to package managers for code. It may become a de facto standard for skill distribution, reducing fragmentation in the AI coding tool ecosystem. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+654 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Open-source, local-first alternative to Claude Design that turns your coding agent into a design studio with 259+ skills, 142+ design systems, and multi-format export. Why it matters: With 64,266 stars, a 24h delta of +654, and a 7-day average of +663 stars/day, this project is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 1.1 indicates steady momentum rather than a sudden spike. The recent v0.10.0 release (all-in-one agentic design workspace) and the launch of the AMR model router likely fuel continued attention. The project sits at the intersection of two hot trends: agentic coding and AI-native design tools. Developer insight: This signals a workflow shift: design is no longer a separate discipline but a capability embedded in the coding agent loop. The rise of 'vibe coding' and agent-generated artifacts means design systems must be machine-readable (DESIGN.md) and version-controlled. Open Design's plugin and skill architecture also points to a marketplace opportunity for agent-composable design components. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] tirth8205/code-review-graph (+61 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +61，总 stars 18,461，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] getagentseal/codeburn (+71 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +71，总 stars 7,957，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
